title: K8s Pod Resources vs SKU Capacity
description: Monitors K8s pod resource requests, limits, and actual usage against configurable SKU capacity. Covers GPU, vCPU, Memory, VRAM, and Local Storage with violation detection.

list.name: sku_gpu_count
list.label: SKU: GPU Count (per node)
list.description: Total number of GPUs available in the SKU (e.g. 8 for A100x8)

list.name: sku_cpu_cores
list.label: SKU: vCPU Cores
list.description: Total vCPU cores in the SKU

list.name: sku_memory_value
list.label: SKU: Memory (in unit selected below)
list.description: Total memory in the same unit as the Memory Unit dropdown (default: 22528 GiB = 22 TiB)

list.name: memory_unit
list.label: Memory Display Unit
list.query: GiB (binary\, 2^30 bytes) : 1073741824, MiB (binary\, 2^20 bytes) : 1048576, TiB (binary\, 2^40 bytes) : 1099511627776, GB (decimal\, 10^9 bytes) : 1000000000, MB (decimal\, 10^6 bytes) : 1000000, TB (decimal\, 10^12 bytes) : 1000000000000, Bytes (raw) : 1
list.description: Unit for memory values. SKU memory value must be in this same unit.

list.name: sku_vram_gib
list.label: SKU: VRAM / GPU Memory (GiB)
list.description: Total GPU VRAM in GiB (e.g. 640 GiB for 8x A100 80GB)

list.name: sku_storage_value
list.label: SKU: Local Storage (in unit selected below)
list.description: Total local/ephemeral storage in the same unit as the Storage Unit dropdown

list.name: storage_unit
list.label: Storage Display Unit
list.query: GiB (binary\, 2^30 bytes) : 1073741824, MiB (binary\, 2^20 bytes) : 1048576, TiB (binary\, 2^40 bytes) : 1099511627776, GB (decimal\, 10^9 bytes) : 1000000000, MB (decimal\, 10^6 bytes) : 1000000, TB (decimal\, 10^12 bytes) : 1000000000000, Bytes (raw) : 1
list.description: Unit for local/ephemeral storage values. SKU value must be in this same unit.

panels.title: GPU SKU Status
panels.description: Whether total GPU requests/usage exceed the configured SKU. EXCEEDS SKU means the sum of all pod GPU reservations is larger than the SKU capacity you entered.

panels.title: vCPU SKU Status
panels.description: Whether total vCPU requests/usage exceed the configured SKU. EXCEEDS SKU means the sum of all pod vCPU reservations is larger than the SKU capacity you entered.

panels.title: Memory SKU Status
panels.description: Whether total Memory requests/usage exceed the configured SKU. EXCEEDS SKU means the sum of all pod Memory reservations is larger than the SKU capacity you entered.

panels.title: VRAM SKU Status
panels.description: Whether total VRAM requests/usage exceed the configured SKU. EXCEEDS SKU means the sum of all pod VRAM reservations is larger than the SKU capacity you entered.

panels.title: Local Storage SKU Status
panels.description: Whether total Local Storage requests/usage exceed the configured SKU. EXCEEDS SKU means the sum of all pod Local Storage reservations is larger than the SKU capacity you entered.

panels.title: SKU Capacity - Reservation vs Actual Utilization
GPU - Reserved vs Used
panels.description: Left: percentage of GPU SKU reserved by pod requests. Right: actual GPU utilization vs SKU.

panels.title: vCPU - Reserved vs Used
panels.description: Left: percentage of vCPU SKU reserved by pod requests. Right: actual vCPU utilization vs SKU.

panels.title: Memory - Reserved vs Used
panels.description: Left: percentage of Memory SKU reserved by pod requests. Right: actual Memory utilization vs SKU.

panels.title: VRAM - Reserved vs Used
panels.description: Left: percentage of VRAM SKU reserved by pod requests. Right: actual VRAM utilization vs SKU.

panels.title: Local Storage - Reserved vs Used
panels.description: Left: percentage of Local Storage SKU reserved by pod requests. Right: actual Local Storage utilization vs SKU.

panels.title: Running Pods (selected scope)
panels.description: Count of pods in selected namespace(s) and node(s)

panels.title: Resource Totals vs SKU Capacity
panels.description: Shows the absolute total reserved for each resource alongside the SKU capacity. If reserved > SKU, the resource is in violation.

panels.title: All Pods - Resource Requests and Limits
panels.description: Complete table of ALL pods in selected scope with named columns for each resource request and limit.

targets.expr: sum by (pod, namespace, node) (kube_pod_container_resource_requests{namespace=~"$namespace", node=~"$node", resource="nvidia.com/gpu"})
sum by (pod, namespace, node) (kube_pod_container_resource_limits{namespace=~"$namespace", node=~"$node", resource="nvidia.com/gpu"})
sum by (pod, namespace, node) (kube_pod_container_resource_requests{namespace=~"$namespace", node=~"$node", resource="cpu"})
sum by (pod, namespace, node) (kube_pod_container_resource_limits{namespace=~"$namespace", node=~"$node", resource="cpu"})
sum by (pod, namespace, node) (kube_pod_container_resource_requests{namespace=~"$namespace", node=~"$node", resource="memory"}) / $memory_unit
sum by (pod, namespace, node) (kube_pod_container_resource_limits{namespace=~"$namespace", node=~"$node", resource="memory"}) / $memory_unit
sum by (pod, namespace, node) (kube_pod_container_resource_requests{namespace=~"$namespace", node=~"$node", resource="ephemeral-storage"}) / $storage_unit
sum by (pod, namespace, node) (kube_pod_container_resource_limits{namespace=~"$namespace", node=~"$node", resource="ephemeral-storage"}) / $storage_unit

panels.title: GPU Count - Requests vs Limits per Pod
panels.description: Each pod's GPU Count request (blue) and limit (orange) side by side

panels.title: GPU Count - SKU Capacity Used
panels.description: What percentage of the configured GPU Count SKU is consumed by pod requests

panels.title: GPU Count - Absolute Totals
panels.description: Total GPU Count requests, limits, and SKU capacity side by side

panels.title: GPU Count - Aggregate Reservation and Limits Over Time
panels.description: Total GPU Count requests + limits over time. Red dashed line = SKU capacity threshold.

panels.title: GPU Count - Reservation by Node (Stacked)
panels.description: How GPU Count reservations are distributed across nodes. Helps identify hotspots.

panels.title: GPU Count - Per-Pod Actual Usage vs Requests vs Limits
panels.description: Solid = actual usage, Dashed = request, Dotted = limit. When solid exceeds dashed, the pod uses more than requested. When solid exceeds dotted, the pod exceeds its limit.

panels.title: GPU Count - Pods Exceeding Allocations
panels.description: Pods where actual GPU Count usage exceeds their request or limit. Positive values mean the pod is consuming more than allocated.

targets.expr: (sum by (pod, namespace, node) (DCGM_FI_DEV_GPU_UTIL{namespace=~"$namespace", node=~"$node"}) / 100 - sum by (pod, namespace, node) (kube_pod_container_resource_requests{namespace=~"$namespace", node=~"$node", resource="nvidia.com/gpu"})) > 0

(sum by (pod, namespace, node) (DCGM_FI_DEV_GPU_UTIL{namespace=~"$namespace", node=~"$node"}) / 100 - sum by (pod, namespace, node) (kube_pod_container_resource_requests{namespace=~"$namespace", node=~"$node", resource="nvidia.com/gpu"})) > 0

panels.title: vCPU - Requests vs Limits per Pod
panels.description: Each pod's vCPU request (blue) and limit (orange) side by side

panels.title: vCPU - SKU Capacity Used
panels.description: What percentage of the configured vCPU SKU is consumed by pod requests

panels.title: vCPU - Absolute Totals
panels.description: Total vCPU requests, limits, and SKU capacity side by side

panels.title: vCPU - Aggregate Reservation and Limits Over Time
panels.description: Total vCPU requests + limits over time. Red dashed line = SKU capacity threshold.

panels.title: vCPU - Reservation by Node (Stacked)
panels.description: How vCPU reservations are distributed across nodes. Helps identify hotspots.

panels.title: vCPU - Per-Pod Actual Usage vs Requests vs Limits
panels.description: Solid = actual usage, Dashed = request, Dotted = limit. When solid exceeds dashed, the pod uses more than requested. When solid exceeds dotted, the pod exceeds its limit.

panels.title: vCPU - Pods Exceeding Allocations
panels.description: Pods where actual vCPU usage exceeds their request or limit. Positive values mean the pod is consuming more than allocated.

targets.expr: (sum by (pod, namespace, node) (rate(container_cpu_usage_seconds_total{namespace=~"$namespace", node=~"$node"}[5m])) - sum by (pod, namespace, node) (kube_pod_container_resource_requests{namespace=~"$namespace", node=~"$node", resource="cpu"})) > 0

(sum by (pod, namespace, node) (rate(container_cpu_usage_seconds_total{namespace=~"$namespace", node=~"$node"}[5m])) - sum by (pod, namespace, node) (kube_pod_container_resource_limits{namespace=~"$namespace", node=~"$node", resource="cpu"})) > 0

panels.title: Memory - Requests vs Limits per Pod
panels.description: Each pod's Memory request (blue) and limit (orange) side by side

panels.title: Memory - SKU Capacity Used
panels.description: What percentage of the configured Memory SKU is consumed by pod requests

panels.title: Memory - Absolute Totals
panels.description: Total Memory requests, limits, and SKU capacity side by side

panels.title: Memory - Aggregate Reservation and Limits Over Time
panels.description: Total Memory requests + limits over time. Red dashed line = SKU capacity threshold.

panels.title: Memory - Reservation by Node (Stacked)
panels.description: How Memory reservations are distributed across nodes. Helps identify hotspots.

panels.title: Memory - Per-Pod Actual Usage vs Requests vs Limits
panels.description: Solid = actual usage, Dashed = request, Dotted = limit. When solid exceeds dashed, the pod uses more than requested. When solid exceeds dotted, the pod exceeds its limit.

panels.title: Memory - Pods Exceeding Allocations
panels.description: Pods where actual Memory usage exceeds their request or limit. Positive values mean the pod is consuming more than allocated.

targets.expr: (sum by (pod, namespace, node) (container_memory_working_set_bytes{namespace=~"$namespace", node=~"$node"}) / $memory_unit - sum by (pod, namespace, node) (kube_pod_container_resource_requests{namespace=~"$namespace", node=~"$node", resource="memory"}) / $memory_unit) > 0

(sum by (pod, namespace, node) (container_memory_working_set_bytes{namespace=~"$namespace", node=~"$node"}) / $memory_unit - sum by (pod, namespace, node) (kube_pod_container_resource_limits{namespace=~"$namespace", node=~"$node", resource="memory"}) / $memory_unit) > 0

panels.title: VRAM (GPU Memory) - Requests vs Limits per Pod
panels.description: Each pod's VRAM (GPU Memory) request (blue) and limit (orange) side by side

panels.title: VRAM (GPU Memory) - SKU Capacity Used
panels.description: What percentage of the configured VRAM (GPU Memory) SKU is consumed by pod requests

panels.title: VRAM (GPU Memory) - Absolute Totals
panels.description: Total VRAM (GPU Memory) requests, limits, and SKU capacity side by side

panels.title: VRAM (GPU Memory) - Aggregate Reservation and Limits Over Time
panels.description: Total VRAM (GPU Memory) requests + limits over time. Red dashed line = SKU capacity threshold.

panels.title: VRAM (GPU Memory) - Reservation by Node (Stacked)
panels.description: How VRAM (GPU Memory) reservations are distributed across nodes. Helps identify hotspots.

panels.title: VRAM (GPU Memory) - Per-Pod Actual Usage vs Requests vs Limits
panels.description: Solid = actual usage, Dashed = request, Dotted = limit. When solid exceeds dashed, the pod uses more than requested. When solid exceeds dotted, the pod exceeds its limit.

panels.title: VRAM (GPU Memory) - Pods Exceeding Allocations
panels.description: Pods where actual VRAM (GPU Memory) usage exceeds their request or limit. Positive values mean the pod is consuming more than allocated.

targets.expr: (sum by (pod, namespace, node) (DCGM_FI_DEV_FB_USED{namespace=~"$namespace", node=~"$node"}) / 1024 - sum by (pod, namespace, node) (DCGM_FI_DEV_FB_USED{namespace=~"$namespace", node=~"$node"} + DCGM_FI_DEV_FB_FREE{namespace=~"$namespace", node=~"$node"}) / 1024) > 0

(sum by (pod, namespace, node) (DCGM_FI_DEV_FB_USED{namespace=~"$namespace", node=~"$node"}) / 1024 - sum by (pod, namespace, node) (DCGM_FI_DEV_FB_USED{namespace=~"$namespace", node=~"$node"} + DCGM_FI_DEV_FB_FREE{namespace=~"$namespace", node=~"$node"}) / 1024) > 0

panels.title: Local Storage - Requests vs Limits per Pod
panels.description: Each pod's Local Storage request (blue) and limit (orange) side by side

panels.title: Local Storage - SKU Capacity Used
panels.description: What percentage of the configured Local Storage SKU is consumed by pod requests

panels.title: Local Storage - Absolute Totals
panels.description: Total Local Storage requests, limits, and SKU capacity side by side

panels.title: Local Storage - Aggregate Reservation and Limits Over Time
panels.description: Total Local Storage requests + limits over time. Red dashed line = SKU capacity threshold.

panels.title: Local Storage - Reservation by Node (Stacked)
panels.description: How Local Storage reservations are distributed across nodes. Helps identify hotspots.

panels.title: Local Storage - Per-Pod Actual Usage vs Requests vs Limits
panels.description: Solid = actual usage, Dashed = request, Dotted = limit. When solid exceeds dashed, the pod uses more than requested. When solid exceeds dotted, the pod exceeds its limit.

panels.title: Local Storage - Pods Exceeding Allocations
panels.description: Pods where actual Local Storage usage exceeds their request or limit. Positive values mean the pod is consuming more than allocated.

targets.expr: (sum by (pod, namespace, node) (container_fs_usage_bytes{namespace=~"$namespace", node=~"$node"}) / $storage_unit - sum by (pod, namespace, node) (kube_pod_container_resource_requests{namespace=~"$namespace", node=~"$node", resource="ephemeral-storage"}) / $storage_unit) > 0

(sum by (pod, namespace, node) (container_fs_usage_bytes{namespace=~"$namespace", node=~"$node"}) / $storage_unit - sum by (pod, namespace, node) (kube_pod_container_resource_limits{namespace=~"$namespace", node=~"$node", resource="ephemeral-storage"}) / $storage_unit) > 0
